series_metadata.series_description: File containing a copy of the remittance to General Revenue, a copy of backup detail in the form of application copies, and postings indicating the dollar amounts paid into the General Fund and the reasons for doing so. File also contains deposit numbers, dates, amounts and breakdown of those amounts as well as transfers, refunds and details of completed transactions.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: audited by State Auditor and audit report is released
